scope.summary: Document the Node CA-bundle environment needed for Claude Code to connect to a self-signed or private-CA HTTPS listener.
out_of_scope: Changing the listener TLS trust model or Claude Code runtime behavior.

limitations: This is a documentation-only change; no live Claude Code or private-CA listener session was run.
No required-proof/v1 artifact exists for this close, so readiness remains not-ready on manual review.
